summary: GCA has enough public material for DEX metadata review and wallet identity checks, but tracked CoinGecko and CoinMarketCap submissions should be deferred until public activity, legitimate liquidity depth, and exchange volume are stronger.
notReadyFor: public claims of mature liquidity or completed external audit

readinessChecks.label: Canonical token identity
readinessChecks.evidence: Base Mainnet chain ID 8453, contract address, logo, official website, token list, and well-known token identity are published.

readinessChecks.label: Contract source and owner verification
readinessChecks.evidence: BaseScan source verification and deployer-wallet ownership verification are complete.

readinessChecks.label: BaseScan token profile
readinessChecks.evidence: Token information update was returned again by BaseScan as information-insufficient on 2026-05-23. Tim Chen official-domain professional profile evidence is published; support@gcagochina.com is active as the project-domain email; the domain email setup plan, public evidence checklist, activation evidence packet, expanded BaseScan reply template, BaseScan Handoff copy blocks, and Chinese owner flow are published. The final owner submission package was regenerated on 2026-06-04T08:49:54Z, the daily public status snapshot was refreshed on 2026-06-04T10:23:29Z, and the 2026-05-30 DNS snapshot shows MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC present.

readinessChecks.label: GeckoTerminal token information
readinessChecks.evidence: GeckoTerminal approved the token information update on 2026-05-11.

readinessChecks.label: Public social presence
readinessChecks.evidence: Official Telegram is live and the official X profile is published at https://x.com/GCAAIGoChina.

readinessChecks.label: Legitimate market activity
readinessChecks.evidence: The official GCA/USDT pool is live, but depth, public activity, and volume remain early and small.

readinessChecks.label: Utility access and member ledger
readinessChecks.evidence: Public account intake, read-only wallet verification, and eligible 100 credits / GCA Member ledger records are live through Workers + D1; the 10,000 GCA member benefit remains manual review only.

readinessChecks.label: Third-party audit
readinessChecks.evidence: Audit quote requests were submitted and then deferred; no independent report has been completed.

readinessChecks.label: No artificial activity policy
readinessChecks.evidence: Listing readiness must be based on legitimate users, transparent liquidity, and truthful public materials; do not use artificial activity, self-trading, wash trading, or misleading volume.

dexScreener.action: Use the live GCA/USDT pair URL and keep official metadata consistent.

geckoTerminal.action: Do not submit duplicate updates unless facts change or GeckoTerminal requests a correction.

coinGecko.action: Wait for stronger public activity, legitimate liquidity depth, social presence, and exchange volume before submission.

coinMarketCap.action: Wait for stronger public activity, legitimate liquidity depth, material volume, and BaseScan profile publication before submission.

safeClaims: GCA is deployed on Base Mainnet with fixed total supply.
The official public market route is the Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
GeckoTerminal token information was approved on 2026-05-11.
CoinGecko and CoinMarketCap tracked listing submissions are prepared but deferred.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap listing before publication
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
locked reserve before on-chain custody changes
external audit completion before an independent report is published
mature liquidity, price support, return promises, or ranking acceptance

nextActions: Use the domain email setup plan at https://gcagochina.com/domain-email.html and evidence checklist at https://gcagochina.com/domain-email-evidence.html, keep support@gcagochina.com active, archive the activation evidence packet before the next BaseScan submission, and submit one clean BaseScan update from the official domain mailbox.

Use the BaseScan Handoff at https://gcagochina.com/basescan-handoff.html and Chinese owner flow at https://gcagochina.com/zh-basescan-submit.html as the owner-side copy and checklist for that same clean submission.

Include the published Tim Chen professional profile URL https://gcagochina.com/tim-chen.html in the next BaseScan submission; add LinkedIn later if BaseScan specifically requires a third-party social-network profile.
Keep the GCA/USDT pool, website, logo, whitepaper, Telegram, X, and metadata files live.
Grow legitimate public activity and liquidity depth before CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap submission.
Use the market quality plan before presenting market-growth updates.
Connect the member and credit claim flow through a controlled HTTPS account UI before calling it public self-service.
Revisit third-party audit only when partner, listing, trust, or liquidity requirements justify it.
